changes.message: session-log rate limit too strict, ended_by overwrite on game-end
v0.24.0 — feedback system, guaranteed session logging, PostHog integration
feedback system — FAB button, modal form, SQLite storage, admin API and UI
guaranteed session log streaming — 30s Socket.IO flush, structured JSON, PostHog integration
client events migrated from files to SQLite, admin page rewired to DB
lazy-start spectator capture stream to avoid mobile host FPS degradation
security hardening — CF-Connecting-IP, CSP tightening, input validation
SoftFloat FPU determinism — bit-exact cross-platform lockstep
